mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer demand, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer spending and construction activity, generating positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint positive changes in RSAFS and HOUST yield negative forward returns in > 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during periods of low policy rates reflects expanding manufacturing capacity without inflationary pressure, producing positive short-term S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO changes during easing cycles correlate with negative 5-day returns (Rank IC < -0.01).

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth directly increases corporate earnings expectations, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDP growth shows zero or negative correlation with 60-day forward returns over any 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy and higher discount rates, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL spikes above the threshold consistently precede positive 20-day returns.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls combined with falling unemployment indicates robust job creation and labor market tightening, supporting positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising PAYEMS and falling UNRATE yields negative forward returns in > 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts during late-cycle expansions signal weakening residential investment and broader demand contraction, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Negative HOUST changes in late-cycle regimes are followed by positive 60-day returns in > 65% of cases.
